name: My Life as a Robot Vacuum
short_description: Assume the role of a Robot vacuum and roll around cleaning up messes in this short 3rd person adventure!
detailed_description:
Take the role of a totally normal robot vacuum in a total normal human world. Clean messes, roll around the house, and experience life as a robot vacuum.

In this 3rd person little adventure game you take on the responsibilities of being a robot vacuum! You'll roll around the house cleaning up messes, making sure to keep the house clean, then return to base to end the day!

As you clean you might notice the owner of the house having conversations, perhaps they are important?

Key features include:

Playing as a robot vacuum

cleaning messes

listening in on conversations

and did I mention.. cleaning messes??
